baseTopic: Exceptional ice cream, gelato, frozen custard, soft serve, and regional frozen treats in the United States
description: Nationwide enrichment wave centered on Albany and fanning outward in rings. The goal is roughly 300 high-quality, real, location-accurate ice cream options after dedupe, with rich product detail and strict product-photo sourcing briefs.

notes: Run with max_parallel 3-4. Expected raw output is 60 targets x 6 entries = 360 before dedupe. Use existing ice cream research artifacts as seed context, then aggregate/dedupe to approximately 300 entries. Product photo rules remain strict: no stock, no exterior-only photos, and all photo briefs should target real product close-ups from official or customer sources.
